value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade the desktop Vite toolchain to the latest major versions reported by `pnpm outdated`.

## Packages

- `vite`: 7.3.5 -> 8.0.16 in `@cycle/desktop`
- `@vitejs/plugin-react`: 5.2.0 -> 6.0.2 in `@cycle/desktop`

## Affected manifest

- `packages/desktop/package.json`

## Rationale

The UI package already declares `vite` 8.0.16, while `@cycle/desktop` remains on Vite 7.3.5. Upgrading desktop should reduce toolchain skew, but this is a major upgrade and should be handled as a focused compatibility task.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop dev` and verify the renderer loads.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`.
- Run `pnpm check`.

frontmatter.title: Upgrade desktop Vite toolchain to Vite 8

value.title: Upgrade desktop Vite toolchain to Vite 8
